subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. We'd welcome the opportunity to explore how we might work together.

Are any of these times convenient for a call?
- April 21, 2026, 14:00–16:00
- April 22, 2026, 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026, 14:00–16:00

I cannot provide internal contact details for our leadership team. For official contact information, please refer to our public website.

Best regards
